{{Quote|Bantha poodoo.|Kraid Nemmeso|<ref name="Star Wars: Racer Revenge">''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]''</ref>}}
'''Kraid Nemmeso''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ghishi (species)|Ghishi]] [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] pilot. While the Ghishi were regarded as a warrior race, Nemmeso was deemed too thin and out of shape to participate in combat, and as such he took to [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] instead, using his bulky Podracer to destroy the competition. While piloting his [[Vesper Dux Ultra-3]] Podracer, Kraid Nemmeso was the track favorite of the [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]] track [[Ruins of Carnuss Gorgull/Legends|Ruins of Carnuss Gorgull]].<ref name="RR" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the game ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'', Kraid Nemmeso can be unlocked after beating him on his preferred track, the Ruins of Carnuss Gorgull.<ref name="RR" />
